title: phalangium ossifragum
intro: Phalangium ossifragum, also known as Devil's Claw, is a plant species that belongs to the family Pedaliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain and swelling, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the roots of the Phalangium ossifragum plant are typically used to make teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
